fuzzy_frames_ai.delta_vs_prior_check: +42 impressions vs 2026-05-05 (was 127). +29 audience (was 35). Engagements/saves/outbound clicks all unchanged. Strong impression growth (+33%) but the funnel remains broken at the click step.
fuzzy_frames_ai.note: Pins ARE going live and impressions trickling up faster, but 0 outbound clicks across 30d remains the funnel block. Phase 2 retrofit (Amazon idea-list URLs on live pins) not done yet for any Fuzzy pin — this is the single highest-leverage fix.

luxe_living_daily.delta_vs_prior_check: +35 impressions vs 2026-05-05 (was 56). +24 audience (was 36). Engagements/saves unchanged at 2/1. Strong impression growth (+62%) — LLD is now the second-best-impression-trending account behind Fuzzy. Note: 2 LLD pins were Phase 2 retrofitted yesterday to point at Amazon idea-list. Too soon to attribute the impression delta to that change but worth watching whether outbound clicks start moving in 48-72h.
luxe_living_daily.note: 1 save still the only positive engagement. Still 0 outbound clicks despite scheduling activity. Pin URL retrofit pilot completed 2026-05-06 morning on 2 pins (Grand Foyer, Victorian Orangery).

aesthetic_spaces_co.delta_vs_prior_check: +9 impressions vs 2026-05-05 (was 12, +75%). FIRST engagement registered on the entire ASC account history (engagements 0 -> 1). Audience also grew (8 -> 14, +75%). ASC is clearly the smallest channel but it's no longer flat-lined — the 9 ASC pins scheduled for 5/3-5/11 appear to be working.
aesthetic_spaces_co.note: ASC bio URL still NOT pointing at asc.html (open todo #10). Even with the first engagement, traffic still leaks at the bio-link step. Most actionable fix: change ASC bio URL — user-only since it's an account-settings change.

totals.note: Full portfolio totals across all 3 accounts. 281 impressions in 30 days (vs 195 yesterday, +44%). Still 0 outbound clicks portfolio-wide despite the impression growth. ASC engagements went 0 -> 1 (first ever). LLD impressions doubled. Funnel diagnosis unchanged: traffic is growing but descriptions don't drive clicks. Highest-leverage next move is finishing the Phase 2 Pinterest live pin URL retrofit — only 2 of 114 done.
